'''Omonoth''' was an [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] [[White dwarf/Legends|white dwarf]] type star in the [[Omonoth system/Legends|Omonoth system]], ringed with [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] mined by [[The Adasca BioMechanical Corporation of Arkania|Adascorp]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. The ring became infested with [[Exogorth/Legends|exogorths]], which devoured the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] mining stations. The star was in a region contested by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] and [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]].

[[File:Omonothexogorths.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Exogorths devouring the asteroids around Omonoth.]]

==Behind the scenes==
The name of Omonoth was based on those of the ancient alien creatures present in the works of [[Wikipedia:H.P. Lovecraft|H.P. Lovecraft]].<ref>{{DHBoards|url=viewtopic.php?t=11859|thread=KotOR #18 -- Here there be dragons!|user=[[John Jackson Miller]]|time=07:31}}</ref>
